items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the exploratory step.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the persona scenario of copying settings from one business to another, but there is no direct evidence provided that confirms this functionality has been implemented or tested. The linked use cases and prior steps do not include any specific tests or outcomes related to this scenario, leading to an inconclusive assessment. Therefore, the lack of concrete evidence prevents a definitive validation of the expected result.
